summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of SCRUM.FLOW (FastAPI + React + MongoDB). Backend: 13/13 pytest cases pass covering auth (invalid session, missing creds, valid bearer), full task CRUD, status='done' auto-fills actual_end_date, parent/child unlink-on-delete, /api/stats shape, and user scoping (cross-user 404). Frontend: Login renders Continue with Google; with mongosh-injected session cookie (httpOnly, secure, sameSite=None) Dashboard, Kanban, Tree, Archive, Stats all load; task creation modal creates task that appears in Daily focus immediately; Stats reflects new task (Total=1, Actives=1) with bar + pie charts; Logout returns to /login.

issues: No data-testid attributes on interactive elements (buttons, inputs, nav links, modal fields, kanban columns) — automation had to rely on text/role selectors. Add data-testid to comply with project guideline.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to interactive elements (Nouvelle tâche button, modal title/description/date/priority/status fields, Créer/Enregistrer submit, kanban columns by status, logout button, nav links).
Consider validating priority/status enums on backend (currently any string is accepted); minor hardening.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: priority/status are free-text strings without enum validation — invalid values would corrupt by_status/by_priority counters. Use Literal/Enum in Pydantic.
server.py: parent_id is not validated to belong to the same user or to exist; could allow cross-user references via direct API.
server.py: archive endpoint only sets archived=True; no protection against archiving a task that has active children (UX choice — flag for product).
Frontend: missing data-testid attributes across the app — violates project testability guideline.
auth: cookie set with sameSite=None+secure is correct for cross-site preview, good. session_token reused as-is from upstream; consider rotating on each /auth/session call.
test_credentials: Used mongosh-injected sessions per /app/auth_testing.md (no real Google OAuth available). TOKEN1=tt_1778100975215_4j3huaiovnm, TOKEN2=tt2_1778100975215_ciqhu1wav4 (test_database).
seed_data_creation: Inserted 2 test users + 2 user_sessions in test_database for backend & UI tests. TEST_-prefixed tasks were cleaned up after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is parameterized via env vars TEST_TOKEN1/TEST_USERID1/TEST_TOKEN2 and REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Inject fresh sessions via /app/auth_testing.md before re-running. UI gated routes require setting cookie session_token (httpOnly, secure, sameSite=None) on host backlog-master-4.preview.emergentagent.com. Kanban drag-drop wasn't simulated (dnd-kit pointer events) — backend status update was verified separately via PUT /api/tasks/{id}. App is in French.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All requested features behave as specified.
